primary_text:
This is not an ad for pet insurance.

It is a wellness plan. $50/month. Unlimited vet consults at your local clinic. All vaccinations. $250 off dental. Annual blood and urine tests. 24/7 virtual vet access.

No claims. No excess. No pre-existing condition exclusions. Because it is not insurance.

Members save $800 to $1,300 a year on routine care.

No joining fee. No waiting period. Cancel anytime.

Find a participating clinic near you.
headline: This is not pet insurance.
description: $50/month. Unlimited consults, vaccinations, $250 off dental. Not insurance. Cancel anytime.
cta: Find a participating clinic near you
